title: Fastly Service
description: A Fastly service represents the configuration for a website, app, API, or anything else to be served through Fastly's global edge network. Services are the primary organizational unit in Fastly, containing domain mappings, backend configurations, and VCL or Compute logic.

id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the service.

customer_id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the customer account that owns the service.

comment.description: A freeform descriptive note about the service.

type.description: The type of service, either VCL for traditional Varnish-based services or wasm for Compute services.

active_version.description: The currently active version number for the service.

versions.description: A list of version objects associated with the service.

created_at.description: The date and time in ISO 8601 format when the service was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time in ISO 8601 format when the service was last updated.

deleted_at.description: The date and time in ISO 8601 format when the service was deleted, or null if not deleted.

ServiceVersion.description: A version of a Fastly service representing a distinct configuration snapshot that can be activated or deactivated independently.

service_id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the service.

active.description: Whether this version is currently active and serving traffic.

locked.description: Whether this version is locked and cannot be modified.

deployed.description: Whether this version has been deployed.

staging.description: Whether this version is in the staging environment.

testing.description: Whether this version is in the testing environment.

comment.description: A freeform descriptive note about the version.

created_at.description: The date and time the version was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the version was last updated.

deleted_at.description: The date and time the version was deleted.
